_comment: Local-dev stub. CI overwrites this with repo.json content at release time. Edit repo.json (the single source of truth); this file only exists so local debug builds load with sensible metadata.
Author: MTVirux
Name: Crystal Terror
Punchline: Track your shards, crystals and clusters across player and retainers
Description: Shows a table with counts of shards, crystals and clusters in player inventory and retainer pages. Commands: /crystaline, /ct - open the plugin window.
